content.fact_text: Implements InventoryMutationService providing robust, secure, and transactional stock mutation logic for an event-driven ecommerce backend.

provenance_data.behaviour: Processes inventory mutations by verifying HMAC signatures, validating schemas via Zod, and performing atomic database transactions using PostgreSQL via Knex. Integrates circuit breaker logic for database resilience and emits JSON logs for observability. Handles errors explicitly and masks PII in logs.
interfaces: processMutation(rawPayload: unknown, signature: string, traceParent?: string): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides production-ready, thread-safe, and resilient inventory state mutation capabilities, ensuring data integrity and security within an event-driven architecture.
